text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel-Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d'Erudition & de Critique. <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son bien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmenté d'un Nouveau Supplement de deux Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecine</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>avec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; die gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE>.</BIBL> So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4°.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":16,"explanation":"Fixed malformed characters from encoding errors (e.g. Buchläden, Bücher, Subscriptiones, appellé, die), escaped ampersands as &, corrected inconsistent price tags from PRIZE to PRICE, repaired one mismatched closing tag, normalized punctuation around BIBL elements, removed stray corrupted symbols, and added/corrected text where the XML structure was faulty but inferable."}

parsed.explanation: Fixed malformed characters from encoding errors (e.g. Buchläden, Bücher, Subscriptiones, appellé, die), escaped ampersands as &, corrected inconsistent price tags from PRIZE to PRICE, repaired one mismatched closing tag, normalized punctuation around BIBL elements, removed stray corrupted symbols, and added/corrected text where the XML structure was faulty but inferable.
